case_title: TANJA BECK VS. ARMANDO LUNA OF TRIFUSION YOGA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-27-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PURSUANT TO THE VOLUNTARY MEDIATION AGREEMENT SIGNED BY BOTH PARTIES ON OCT-13-16 THE DEFENDANT WILL PAY $150.00 OVER SIX MONTHS. BEGINNING NOV-14-16 AND ENDING JUN-15-17. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF TANJA BECK. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ARMANDO LUNA OF TRIFUSION YOGA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 4/5/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NO SUCH NUMBER-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 8/19/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
